sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-09-16 17:53
- Distance: 6.3 km
- Moving time: 36:04
- Elapsed time: 36:09
- Elevation gain: 167.6 m
- Average heart rate: 164.6 bpm
- Max heart rate: 179 bpm
- Average watts: 222 W
- Average speed: 10.5 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `166.1 bpm`, ranging from `154.0` to `174.1 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `172.9 spm`, with a working range of `102.2` to `174.8 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `172.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `173.5 spm` (+1.4 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:43 /km` across `6.313 km` in `36:04` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:34 /km` and second-half pace was `5:52 /km` (+18 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `164.6 bpm` average and `179 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `157.9 bpm` in the first half and `171.4 bpm` in the second (+13.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `36:04` out of `36:09` elapsed (99.8%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `7` stop segments and `0.9%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `174.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `35.6 m` and `75.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `57.0 m` in the first half and `117.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
